title: The Serpentine Atlas
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In 1720s Constantinople, a mapmaker's daughter secretly completes her executed father's forbidden survey of the Ottoman Empire, threading between Venetian spies, Ottoman scholars, and the Sultan's vizier.
long_description: In 1720s Constantinople, a mapmaker's daughter secretly completes her executed father's forbidden survey of the Ottoman Empire, threading between Venetian spies, Ottoman scholars, and the Sultan's vizier.
